title: Review planning docs
description: Read current revised build plan and old product outline to separate current stack decisions from historical context.

title: Inspect reusable pipeline template
description: Review reusable auth, SqlMapper, Liquibase, storage, frontend type/theme, and agent convention sources in the pipeline saas-template project.

title: Create finance agent instructions
description: Create project-local AGENTS instructions covering stack, reusable template conventions, ports, Liquibase, product rules, and git behavior.

title: Create setup README
description: Create a README that records planning sources, reserved local ports, infrastructure choices, task-board convention, and expected dev commands.

title: Add git hygiene files
description: Add .gitignore and .gitattributes for React, .NET, Liquibase, local secrets, local databases, and object-storage runtime data.

title: Initialize local git repository
description: Initialize local git repository with main as the default branch without adding a remote or pushing.

title: Create task board CSV
description: Create task-board.csv with required headers and rows for completed setup plus future build work.

title: Scaffold repository structure
description: Create client, server, shared/reference, db/liquibase, and local infra folders according to the revised build plan.

title: Scaffold ASP.NET Core API
description: Create the finance backend project and solution using reusable server conventions where possible.

title: Scaffold React frontend
description: Create the finance React/Vite frontend and wire it to port 5273 and backend API URL 8353.

title: Configure local services
description: Add local PostgreSQL and S3-compatible storage configuration using ports 5438, 9010, and 9011.

title: Wire reusable auth
description: Integrate shared authentication, current-user context, protected API routes, and protected frontend routes.

title: Wire object storage
description: Add or reuse an S3 storage abstraction and validate import/export storage prefixes.

title: Add health endpoint
description: Expose a health endpoint covering API, PostgreSQL, and S3 configuration checks.

title: Create frontend route shell
description: Add routes for dashboard, accounts, transactions, imports, subscriptions, reports, and settings.

title: Configure Liquibase
description: Create finance Liquibase properties, master changelog, and initial migration structure.

title: Create core finance schema
description: Add Liquibase migration for accounts, transactions, and transaction_splits with constraints and indexes.

title: Create finance domain models
description: Create C# models/entities for accounts, transactions, and splits using SqlMapper mapping conventions.

title: Create account and transaction DTOs
description: Define request/response DTOs for accounts, transactions, filters, and paged results.

title: Create service layer skeleton
description: Add AccountService, TransactionService, TransferService, ReportService, ImportService, and shared finance utilities.

title: Create frontend finance contracts
description: Add finance TypeScript contracts to schema.ts or the local equivalent.

title: Create API service hooks
description: Add account and transaction API service functions and query hooks using the reusable API client pattern.

title: Create money and date utilities
description: Add formatMoney, formatDate, toApiDate, monthRange, and monthly range helpers.

title: Build accounts API
description: Implement account list, detail, create, update, archive/close, and opening-balance transaction behavior.

title: Build accounts UI
description: Implement account list, account detail, create/edit modal, account badges, balances, and dashboard inclusion toggle.

title: Build transactions API
description: Implement paginated/filterable transaction CRUD, voiding, status updates, and detail responses.

title: Build transfer API
description: Implement atomic paired transfer creation and safe transfer void behavior.

title: Build transactions UI
description: Implement transactions table, filters, add/edit modal, quick edits, void confirmation, and transfer mode.

title: Build split transaction support
description: Validate split totals server-side and add split editor/table indicators client-side.

title: Build dashboard summary
description: Implement dashboard aggregation endpoint and frontend summary cards, period picker, recent transactions, and placeholders.

title: Create import schema
description: Add Liquibase migrations and models for import_batches, import_preview_rows, import_templates, import_rules, and classification_rules.

title: Build S3 upload flow
description: Implement import upload endpoint with file size/type validation, S3 write, metadata persistence, and upload UI step.

title: Build parsing and mapping
description: Implement CSV parsing, detected columns, saved templates, date/amount formats, and mapping UI.

title: Build preview and duplicate detection
description: Generate preview rows, apply rules, compute import hashes, detect duplicates, and show editable preview table.

title: Build import commit
description: Commit accepted preview rows to transactions atomically and return imported/skipped/rejected summary.

title: Build import rules manager
description: Implement CRUD, priority reorder, test endpoint, and settings UI for regex import rules.

title: Build classification rules manager
description: Implement CRUD, priority, rule application service, and UI test panel for classification rules.

title: Create tags recurring notes schema
description: Add Liquibase migrations and models for tags, transaction_tags, recurring_rules, notes, and reminders.

title: Build tags system
description: Implement tag CRUD, transaction tag assignment, tag filters, tag selector, and settings/tag manager UI.

title: Build recurring rules API
description: Implement recurring rule CRUD, matching logic, next expected calculations, and subscription status endpoint.

title: Build subscriptions UI
description: Implement subscriptions page, monthly normalized cost summary, overdue/upcoming sections, and rule modal.

title: Build notes system
description: Implement notes CRUD, note matching, dismiss/match actions, notes page, and transaction match banner.

title: Build reminders infrastructure
description: Implement scheduled reminder worker, reminders API, dashboard reminder list, and nav badge.

title: Build report endpoints
description: Implement cash flow, category breakdown, business/personal, tag breakdown, balance history, subscriptions trend, and net worth endpoints.

title: Integrate charts
description: Add chart components and shared chart formatting for dashboard, reports, accounts, tags, and subscriptions.

title: Build reports page
description: Create reports page with period picker, account/classification filters, summaries, charts, tables, and export actions.

title: Build CSV/PDF exports
description: Implement frontend exports and backend persisted export endpoints where large datasets or stored downloads are needed.

title: Build reconciliation schema
description: Add balance_checkpoints migration with expected balance and discrepancy fields.

title: Build reconciliation flow
description: Implement checkpoint APIs, account checkpoint panel, reconcile page, and bulk/quick status actions.

title: Create finance profile extension
description: Add user_finance_profiles schema, API, and settings/profile UI without modifying shared auth tables directly.

title: Build guidance engine
description: Implement deterministic guidance service and endpoint for savings rate, emergency fund, 50/30/20, subscriptions, business expense ratio, and debt service.

title: Build guidance UI
description: Create guidance dashboard/cards with statuses, thresholds, messages, and supporting metrics.

title: Build settings pages
description: Implement settings tabs for profile, categories, tags, import rules, classification rules, recurring rules, account settings, and data/exports.

title: Run UX consistency pass
description: Confirm loading, empty, destructive action, validation, money/date, table filter, and keyboard shortcut behavior across the app.

title: Run full manual flow tests
description: Test create account, add/edit transaction, transfer, void, and dashboard updates.

title: Run full import flow tests
description: Test upload to S3, parse, map, preview, duplicate rejection, commit, and report/dashboard updates with a real bank CSV.

title: Production hardening
description: Verify auth coverage, user scoping, rate limits, upload safety, logging, health checks, indexes, S3 permissions, and production API config.

title: Finalize developer docs
description: Update README with prerequisites, local setup, PostgreSQL, S3/MinIO, env vars, dev commands, migration commands, imports, tests, and deployment notes.
